title: Caprifolium implexum
taxonomy: Caprifolium implexum is classified within the family Caprifoliaceae, commonly known as the honeysuckle family. This family consists of around 290 species of flowering plants, mostly woody shrubs or vines. The Caprifoliaceae family is part of the larger order Dipsacales, which includes plants with distinctive flowers and fruit. Caprifolium implexum, along with other members of the family, is native to South America. The classification of Caprifolium implexum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the honeysuckle family.
